name: python3-nltk
title: python3-nltk
summary: Python3 libraries for natural language processing
description:
Python3 libraries for natural language processing
The Natural Language Toolkit (NLTK) is a leading platform for building
Python programs to work with human language data. It provides easy-to-use
interfaces to over 50 corpora and lexical resources such as WordNet,
along with a suite of text processing libraries for classification,
tokenization, stemming, tagging, parsing, and semantic reasoning.
.
This package contains the modules for Python3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use nltk because Python3 libraries for natural language processing.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use nltk as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `nltk [options] [args]` as documented upstream for nltk.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair nltk with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `nltk --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
